---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.contact-block}
**Enrique Escalante, Ph.D.**

Assistant Professor of Economics
Norris-Vincent College of Business
Angelo State University
San Angelo, TX 76909

Research Assistant Professor
Free Market Institute
Texas Tech University
:::

::: {.contact-block}
**Email:** [eescalante@angelo.edu](mailto:eescalante@angelo.edu)

**Academic Profiles**
[Curriculum Vitae](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1e-_bLVNg0Z8_s7XfpIwmXEeJi2q2iyGb/view?usp=drive_link)
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=W0YLItcAAAAJ&hl=en)
[SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=2602348)
:::
